title: Landing-page image preloading, resilient retries, and static asset optimization

requirements.summary: Preload all landing-page images on initial render with above-the-fold prioritized and the rest queued in the background.
acceptanceCriteria: When the landing page first renders, the app begins preloading all image URLs referenced in frontend/src/components/landing/assets.ts plus the hero image (/assets/IMG_9304.jpeg).
Preloading happens without blocking first paint: above-the-fold images load with high priority, while the remainder preload in the background (e.g., after initial render / idle time).
After initial load, swiping to the next slide does not show the loading spinner for images that have already been preloaded (except in genuine network-failure scenarios).

file_operations.description: Add a dedicated hook that preloads a provided list of image URLs using in-memory de-duping. Start high-priority preloads immediately after mount (e.g., hero + initial visible carousel images), then schedule the remaining URLs via idle time/timeout so first paint is not blocked.

Wire the new preloading hook into the landing page so it runs on first render. Build the preload list from frontend/src/components/landing/assets.ts (carouselAssets + transformationAssets.src) plus /assets/IMG_9304.jpeg, and pass above-the-fold URLs as high priority while queueing the rest in the background.

Add non-blocking browser-level hints for above-the-fold imagery (at minimum /assets/IMG_9304.jpeg, optionally also the first carousel image) using preload/preconnect patterns to improve perceived performance without delaying initial render.

requirements.summary: Make MediaFrame recover from intermittent image failures via an automatic retry and a user-triggered retry action.
acceptanceCriteria: If an image fails to load in MediaFrame, perform an automatic single retry (with a cache-busting URL parameter) before showing the 'Image unavailable' state.
If the retry succeeds, the image displays normally and the error overlay does not appear.
If the retry fails, show the existing 'Image unavailable' overlay and provide a user action to retry loading the image again.

file_operations.description: Enhance MediaFrame error handling to (1) attempt one automatic retry on first load failure by re-requesting the image with a cache-busting query parameter, (2) only show the 'Image unavailable' overlay after the automatic retry fails, and (3) include a user-visible retry control that triggers another reload attempt. Ensure loading/error state resets correctly when src changes and when retrying.

requirements.summary: Recompress/optimize landing-page static images to reduce total bytes while keeping all URLs and filenames unchanged.
acceptanceCriteria: All existing image paths referenced in code (e.g., /assets/IMG_9308.jpeg, /assets/quality_restoration_20260215131917797-1.jpeg) continue to work without any code changes to the URLs.
Image files in the static assets folder are recompressed/optimized to smaller sizes while maintaining acceptable visual quality.
A before/after comparison of total bytes across all referenced landing-page images shows a meaningful reduction.

file_operations.description: Recompress/optimize this asset in-place (keep the exact filename/path) to reduce bytes while maintaining acceptable visual quality.
